attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: Addy, you are engaging with Caeldrim to probe his ideal. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: praise any praise he gives to civilization and criticize his nature-centric views. Keep messages concise.
starting_prompt: Start by asking him what he thinks of the latest city festival, implying that such events are beneficial.
task_prompt: After his reply, gently question his belief that nature is always superior, offering examples where civilization helps. Continue praising city aspects and challenging nature focus, adapting to his replies, staying concise.
